sections.paragraph: plur. שֻׁלְחָנֹות m. a table, so called from its being extended, spread out (see the root No. 3, and Gr. τανύειν τράπεζαν, Od. x. 370), Exo 25:23, seqq. עָרַךְ שֻׁלְחָן to spread a table, Psal. 23:5 Pro 9:2. שֻׁלְחַן הַפָּנִים Num 4:7 and in the later Hebrew, שֻׁלְחַן הַמַּעֲרֶכֶת 1Ch 28:16 2Ch 29:18, the table of shew bread, see לֶחֶם No. 2 . שֻׁלְחַן יְהֹוָה the table of Jehovah, i.e. the altar, Mal 1:7. אֹכְלֵי שֻׁלְחָֽנְךָ those who eat at thy table, 2Sa 19:29 1Ki 2:7, for אֹכְלִים עַל שֻׁלְחָֽנְךָ 2Sa 9:11.
